The system exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing incomplete code or simplified implementations instead of the requested functionality), weak verification (failing to identify errors in generated code), task derailment (proposing irrelevant solutions or implementations), information withholding (providing incomplete information), action-reasoning mismatch (proposing solutions that don't align with the reasoning), step repetition (repeating the same thought or information), loss of conversation history (agents seemingly forgetting previous interactions), premature termination (stopping tasks before completion), and ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification). The most prominent issues are weak verification and task derailment, leading to incorrect or incomplete solutions.
